access_notes: WebFetch accessible; script (requests) also accessible. Discontinued items carry last-known public price — accepted as valid reference signal (not active stock required).

access_notes: Seeded manually. Price and product page confirmed for 1011893-RU (Titan harness 1-point). Photo not separately confirmed.
notes: Russian B2B ladder/fall-protection distributor. Not in trust.py or seed_source_trust.json. Covers Honeywell PPE fall-protection (SPERIAN TITAN series). Candidate for ru_b2b tier — needs one confirmed script-accessible price run to validate.

access_notes: Script accessible. Photo downloaded for 00020211 (PEHA frame). Price present on page but category mismatch: 00020211 is PEHA switchgear, not temperature sensor per InSales seed product_name. Tameson sells PEHA as switchgear category.
notes: European B2B/B2C components commerce site. tier=weak in trust.py (weight 0.20). Carries PEHA products but NOT industrial automation sensors. Category mismatch flag for any SKU where InSales product_name says Датчик but PN resolves to switchgear. Use for PEHA photo/price, not BMS.

access_notes: WebFetch accessible. Script returns access_denied_or_non_html (non-HTML response or bot-protection). Price £71.50 confirmed in search snippet for 1011894-RU but lineage=False in script run (surface conflict).

Use as seed hint (human-readable price from snippet) not as automated lineage-confirmed source. Candidate for industrial tier after bot-protection bypass strategy confirmed.

access_notes: 403 in both script and WebFetch. Large UK industrial distributor — prices likely present but access blocked.

access_notes: Product listed as discontinued. Page accessible but price not confirmed via script or WebFetch.

access_notes: Site carries Honeywell PPE (1034491 Impact Pro confirmed) but does NOT carry Howard Leight Leightning series. Wrong domain for 1012541/1015021 scout.

access_notes: Sells uvex-BRAND hearing protection only. Not a source for Honeywell / Howard Leight branded products.
notes: WRONG DOMAIN for Howard Leight / Honeywell PPE search. uvex is a separate safety brand (Honeywell acquired uvex safety but product catalogs are separate). Do not use for Leightning, Titan, or Bilsom product scouting.

notes: UK/EU safety distributor with exact Howard Leight Leightning L3H EU (1012541) page. Priority EU source for helmet-adapter earmuff series. Access requires manual browser verification. Do NOT attempt bot-protection bypass per policy.
